# Aura Score

> Free personal aura and energy reading tool. Discover your aura colors and energy patterns.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://aura.csskey.com/)
- [About](https://aura.csskey.com/about)
- [Privacy Policy](https://aura.csskey.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://aura.csskey.com/terms)
- [Contact](https://aura.csskey.com/contact)

## Features
- Aura reading
- Energy analysis
- Chakra colors
- Personal traits
- Daily insights
